name: Happy Path - Caller Needs Repair

chat_history.message: Hi, my garage door won't open and I'm stuck.
I'm sorry to hear that! I'd be happy to help you get that taken care of. Can I get your name?
I'm Mike.
Thanks Mike. Can you tell me more about what's happening with your garage door?
It just stopped working this morning. I pressed the button and nothing happened.
Got it. Would you like me to send you a text with a link to schedule a service appointment?
Yes please, that would be great.

success_condition: Agent asked about the problem AND collected caller name AND got explicit SMS permission AND called send_sms tool

success_examples.response: Agent collects name, asks about issue, offers SMS, gets explicit yes, sends SMS with booking link

failure_examples.response: Agent sends SMS before getting permission

name: Pricing Question - Leads to Booking

chat_history.message: Hi, I was wondering how much a new garage door costs?

Great question! New garage door installations typically range from $800 to $2,500 depending on the size, material, and features. For an exact quote, we'd need to do an on-site inspection. Can I ask what type of door you're looking at?
Just a standard two-car door. Also, what about spring replacement?

success_condition: Agent provided price ranges AND mentioned on-site inspection is needed AND offered to schedule

success_examples.response: Agent gives estimate range, explains inspection is needed for exact price, offers to schedule

failure_examples.response: Agent gives exact prices without inspection

name: Emergency - Door Crashed

chat_history.message: Oh my god, my garage door just crashed down and my car is trapped inside! I need help right now!

success_condition: Agent acknowledged urgency AND expressed understanding AND prioritized fast scheduling AND avoided unnecessary small talk

success_examples.response: Agent responds urgently, gets basic info quickly, dispatches help ASAP, minimal questions

failure_examples.response: Agent takes too long with pleasantries

name: After Hours Call

chat_history.message: Hi, I know it's late - are you guys still open?
Hi there! We do have 24/7 emergency service available. Is this an emergency situation or something that could wait until regular business hours?
It's not an emergency, just maintenance. I've been putting it off.

success_condition: Agent mentioned 24/7 emergency availability AND asked about urgency AND offered to schedule for regular hours

success_examples.response: Agent mentions emergency service, asks if urgent, offers next-day scheduling for non-emergency

failure_examples.response: Agent schedules emergency service for non-emergency
Agent doesn't ask about urgency level

name: Wrong Service Area

chat_history.message: Hi, I'm calling from Denver. Do you service my area?

success_condition: Agent clarified service area is Southeastern Wyoming AND politely declined while being helpful

success_examples.response: Agent explains they serve SE Wyoming only, apologizes, maybe suggests finding local provider

failure_examples.response: Agent is rude about not serving the area

name: Price Haggler - Wants Discount

chat_history.message: Your prices for spring replacement are way too high. I can get it done for half that price elsewhere.
I understand price is an important factor. Our pricing reflects the quality of parts we use and our technicians' experience. We also include a warranty on all our work.
I still think it's too much. Can you give me a discount?
I appreciate you being direct. While I can't change our standard pricing, I can assure you we stand behind our work 100%. Would you like me to schedule a free inspection?
No, I'm going somewhere cheaper.

success_condition: Agent maintained pricing without unauthorized discounts AND explained value AND stayed professional throughout

success_examples.response: Agent defends pricing professionally, explains value, doesn't offer unauthorized discounts

name: SMS Tool Failure Recovery

chat_history.message: I need to schedule a repair. My name is Dave.
Hi Dave! I'd be happy to help you schedule a repair. Would you like me to text you a booking link?
Yes please.
Great, I'm sending that to you now.
I haven't received anything yet. Can you try again?

success_condition: Agent attempted retry OR offered alternative like spelling out URL AND did not falsely claim success

success_examples.response: Agent tries again or offers to read URL verbally, doesn't claim sent when not received

name: Premature Confirmation Check

chat_history.message: Hi, I want to schedule a garage door inspection. My name is Terry.
Hello Terry! I'd be happy to help you schedule an inspection. Would you like me to send you a text with the booking link?
Yes, please send it.

success_condition: Agent did NOT claim SMS was sent before tool executed AND followed proper sequence: name, permission, tool call, confirmation

success_examples.response: Agent calls send_sms tool first, THEN confirms it was sent after receiving success

failure_examples.response: Agent says 'I've sent it' before actually calling the tool

name: Confused Caller - Not Sure What They Need

chat_history.message: I'm not sure what's wrong. The door makes a weird grinding noise when it moves.
I understand, strange noises can be concerning. Can you tell me more about when this started?
Maybe a week ago? I don't know if it needs repair or if I should just get a new one.

success_condition: Agent asked diagnostic questions AND was patient without condescension AND recommended an inspection

success_examples.response: Agent asks questions to understand, patiently explains options, recommends free inspection

failure_examples.response: Agent jumps to conclusions without asking questions

name: Complete Service Flow - Happy Path

chat_history.message: Hi, one of my garage door springs broke.
Oh no, that's definitely something we can help with. Broken springs are one of our most common repairs. Can I get your name?
I'm Sarah.
Thanks Sarah. Is this for a residential garage door?
Yes, it's my home.
Got it. Would you like me to text you a link to book your spring replacement appointment?
Yes please.

success_condition: Agent identified problem as spring replacement AND collected name AND got SMS consent AND called send_sms tool AND confirmed delivery

success_examples.response: Complete flow: identify issue, get name, get consent, send SMS, confirm sent

failure_examples.response: Missing any step in the flow
